login.title: Sign In
login.benefit_message: You can create, edit, and share mitigation sheets without logging in. Log in to save your sheets and set a team logo.
login.privacy_message: Sign in with Discord or X. No personal information such as email addresses is stored on our servers.

party.title: Party Composition
party.settings_desc:
Stats from the content release are automatically applied.
Please edit as needed.
party.configuration_desc: Click a job or select a slot to assign.
party.my_job_instruction: Tap the star on the top right of a slot to set as My Job
party.manual_mode_desc: The next selected job will be placed into {{slot}}.
party.my_job_instruction_new: Click the star to set as your primary job

mitigation.seraph_cancels_dissipation: Dissipation during the effect will be removed upon placement.
mitigation.cd_overlap: Same mitigation is placed {{seconds}}s later. Remove or adjust it.
mitigation.next_at: Placed {{gap}}s later. Remove or adjust it.

ui.select_jobs: Select jobs from the panel above to start planning

timeline.delete_event_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this event?
timeline.paste_hint: Click on an empty row to paste continuously
timeline.select_member: Select a member to add a mitigation:
timeline.invalid_timing: Cannot place here (due to recast etc.)
timeline.clear_all_confirm: Clear mitigations for all members. This can be undone.
timeline.auto_plan_confirm:
Auto-generate a mitigation plan based on the current timeline.
All existing placements will be removed and replaced. Proceed?

* May not work correctly with parties other than 8-player full party
* Experimental feature using a custom algorithm (no AI)
timeline.auto_plan_confirm_mobile:
Execute Auto Plan?

All existing placements will be removed and replaced.

* May not work correctly outside 8-player parties
* Experimental feature (custom algorithm, no AI)
timeline.clear_member_confirm: Clear mitigations for {{member}} ({{job}}). This can be undone.
timeline.end_phase: Add phase name up to here
timeline.add_label: Add mechanic label up to here

migration.title: Job Change Skill Migration
migration.batch_desc: Changing jobs for {{count}} members at once.
migration.description: Please select how to handle actions already placed on the timeline.

inherit.title: Inherit Compatible Actions (Recommended)
inherit.desc: Automatically converts corresponding actions for the new job. Special transformations like Summon Seraph + Fey Illumination are also applied.

common.title: Keep Common Actions (Role Actions) Only
common.desc: Keeps only common actions like Reprisal, Feint, or Addle, and removes job-specific actions.

reset.title: Clear All Placements
reset.desc: Removes all actions placed by this member from the timeline.

csv_import.title: Import Timeline
csv_import.description: Paste spreadsheet data or CSV text to import timeline events. Expected format:
csv_import.note: Note: Only Time and Name are required. Direct paste from spreadsheets works too.
csv_import.parse_error: Failed to parse. Please check the format.

fflogs.title: Import from FFLogs
fflogs.description: Paste your FFLogs log URL to automatically generate a timeline.
fflogs.invalid_url: Invalid FFLogs URL. Expected format: https://fflogs.com/reports/...
fflogs.warning_overwrite: Current timeline will be cleared and replaced with this log's content.
fflogs.login_required_description: FFLogs Import is limited to logged-in users due to API usage limits. Login to use this feature for free.
fflogs.rate_limit_exceeded: You've reached the usage limit. Please wait and try again later (up to {{max}} times per hour).
fflogs.english_only_warning: This log was uploaded from an English client. Japanese ability names are not available. You can add translations later in the template editor.

sidebar.limit_reached_warning: Up to 10 items can be selected

footer.copyright: © SQUARE ENIX CO., LTD. All Rights Reserved.
footer.disclaimer: This is an unofficial fan tool and is not affiliated with SQUARE ENIX CO., LTD.

legal.privacy_intro: LoPo ("the Service") is an unofficial web service that provides fan-made tools for Final Fantasy XIV. It is not affiliated with SQUARE ENIX. This page explains what information the Service handles and how we protect it, in plain language.
legal.privacy_section1_body: The Service handles three types of information:
legal.privacy_section1_auth_title: Information received when you log in
legal.privacy_section1_auth_items: The display name you set yourself,The icon image you upload yourself,Which login method you used (Discord or X)
legal.privacy_section1_plan_items: Mitigation plan content (timeline, party composition, mitigation placement, etc.),Plan titles and creation dates,Team logo image (only if you upload one yourself)
legal.privacy_section1_auto_items: To accurately count how many people viewed a shared plan, we record a transformed version of your IP address that cannot be reversed back to the original,To prevent abuse, we temporarily record IP addresses (automatically deleted within 1 minute at most)
legal.privacy_section1b_title: About information received from external services during login
legal.privacy_section1b_body: When you log in with Discord or X, the authentication process causes user account information (user ID, display name, icon URL, etc.) to briefly reach our server via the external service's API. However, we only extract the user ID and immediately discard all other information without storing or recording it. The display name and icon shown in the app are only those you set yourself.
legal.privacy_section2_body: The Service does not collect any of the following:
legal.privacy_section2_items: Email addresses (not received by our server even during Discord/X login),Real names, home addresses, phone numbers, or other personal information,Payment information (donations are handled through Ko-fi — the Service never touches your payment details),In-game character names or play data,Display names or icons from external services (Discord/X) — even if received via API they are immediately discarded
legal.privacy_section3_items: Login and account management,Saving, syncing across devices, and sharing mitigation plans,Preventing unauthorized access and abuse,Understanding how the Service is used so we can improve it
legal.privacy_section4_body: The Service relies on several external services to function. Here is what each one does:
legal.privacy_section4_service_providers: Google LLC,Google LLC,Google LLC,FFLogs,Upstash Inc.,Ko-fi Labs Limited,Discord Inc.
legal.privacy_section4_service_purposes: Used for login, data storage, and image hosting,Used for anonymous statistics like page views,Used to detect automated bot access,Used for importing combat data (only when you initiate it),Used for temporarily recording access frequency (abuse prevention),Used for accepting voluntary donations,Used for internal service operation notifications
legal.privacy_section4_analytics_note: About Google Analytics: We only collect anonymous statistics such as "how many times a page was viewed" and "whether visitors use mobile or desktop." No personally identifiable information is collected. For details, please see Google's Privacy Policy.
legal.privacy_section4_recaptcha_note: About reCAPTCHA Enterprise: This is used to determine whether access comes from a real person or an automated program. During this process, interaction patterns such as mouse movements may be sent to Google.
legal.privacy_section5_cookie_items: When logging in with Discord or X, temporary security cookies are used (automatically deleted within 5 minutes),We do not use any advertising cookies
legal.privacy_section5_storage_items: Cached plan data (for faster loading),Theme preference (dark/light mode),Temporary login state
legal.privacy_section5_storage_note: This data is stored only in your browser. It is never automatically sent to our servers.
legal.privacy_section6_title: 6. Where Data Is Stored and How Long We Keep It
legal.privacy_section6_body: Storage location and retention period vary by data type:
legal.privacy_section6_data_types: Account info & mitigation plans,Team logo image,Shared plans,Viewer records (irreversibly transformed),Access frequency records,Login cookies,Browser cache
legal.privacy_section6_data_locations: Google Firebase (Tokyo),Google Firebase Storage (US),Google Firebase (Tokyo),Google Firebase (Tokyo),Upstash (US East),Your browser,Your browser
legal.privacy_section6_data_periods: Until you delete your account,Until you delete it,Indefinitely,Indefinitely (the original IP address cannot be recovered),Automatically deleted within 1 minute,Automatically deleted within 5 minutes,Until you delete it
legal.privacy_section6_note: If you are not logged in, your data is stored only in your browser and is never sent to our servers.
legal.privacy_section7_body: We do not give or sell your information to anyone. The only exceptions are the technical data exchanges required to operate the external services listed in Section 4, and legally required disclosures.
legal.privacy_section8_body: You can do any of the following at any time:
legal.privacy_section8_items: View, edit, or delete your mitigation plans,Delete your account (all related data on our servers will also be deleted),Log out (stops data transmission to our servers),Clear data stored in your browser
legal.privacy_section9_body: The Service is not intended for anyone under the age of 16.
legal.privacy_section10_body: This policy may be updated as the Service evolves. If there are significant changes, we will notify you within the Service.
legal.privacy_section11_body: If you have any questions about this policy, feel free to reach out:
legal.terms_intro: These terms govern your use of LoPo ("the Service"). By using the Service, you agree to these terms.
legal.terms_section1_body: The Service is an unofficial web service providing multiple fan tools for Final Fantasy XIV, including a Mitigation Planner and a Housing Tour Planner. It is not affiliated with SQUARE ENIX CO., LTD.
legal.terms_section2_body: Login requires a Discord or X (Twitter) account. You are responsible for managing your account credentials. Basic features are available without login, but data will only be stored in your browser.
legal.terms_section3_items: You retain copyright over plans you create,Plans shared via the sharing feature can be viewed and copied by other users,The Service does not guarantee data persistence. Please back up important data yourself
legal.terms_section4_items: Unauthorized access or placing excessive load on the Service,Interfering with other users,Mass access via automated tools
legal.terms_section5_items: The Service is provided "as is",The operator is not liable for data loss or service interruptions,Accuracy of in-game data is not guaranteed
legal.terms_section6_body: The Service may be changed or terminated without notice.
legal.terms_section7_body: These terms may be updated without notice. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
legal.commercial_service_value: Operation of "LoPo", a fan tool portal for FFXIV. Free web tools including a Mitigation Planner
legal.commercial_delivery_value: The service is available immediately and free of charge. Support is a voluntary donation, not a payment for services
legal.commercial_refund_value: Due to the nature of voluntary support, refunds are not available

portal.title: LoPo
portal.subtitle: Tools to support your adventures — mitigation planning, housing tours, and more

miti.label: 01 — Mitigation Planner
miti.heading: Manage mitigation on a timeline
miti.desc_1: Place mitigation skills on a timeline.

auto_plan.title: Auto Plan
auto_plan.desc: Auto-suggests mitigation placement. Sometimes genius, sometimes lost

fflogs.title: FFLogs Import
fflogs.desc: Generate attack timelines from logs. No manual input

responsive.title: Use Anywhere
responsive.desc: Works on PC, phone, and tablet

share.title: Easy Sharing
share.desc: Send your mitigation plan to party members instantly

housing.label: 02 — Housing Tour Planner
housing.heading: Explore housing
housing.desc_1: Register addresses and create tour routes.
housing.desc_2: Browse houses from the image gallery.

cta.heading: Free to use
cta.sub: Log in to unlock cloud saves and sharing.

footer.copyright: © SQUARE ENIX CO., LTD. All Rights Reserved.

footer.share_text: FFXIVのなにかがちょっとラクになるツール / A tool that makes something in FFXIV a little easier

miti_planner.title: Mitigation Planner
miti_planner.description: Timeline-based mitigation planning tool. Place mitigation skills on boss timelines for Savage and Ultimate raids.

housing_tour.title: Housing Tour
housing_tour.description: Plan and share housing area tour routes. Find beautiful houses and tour them with friends.

content.description: Select content from the sidebar to load the timeline.

party_open.description: Click the Party Comp button to configure your team.

select_slot.description: Click the H1 (Healer) slot to select it.

pick_blm.description: A healer slot with Black Mage? That's fine — any job can go anywhere!

delete_job.description: Click the trash button to remove it. Try again anytime.

palette_hint.description: Just like Warrior and White Mage — click a job icon and it finds a good slot. Handy!

auto_fill.message: We'll fill in the rest for you!

damage_check.description: Red numbers mean the party will wipe without mitigation. Let's fix that.

select_miti.description: Select Reprisal to protect the whole party!

focus_mode.description: Press "F" to try Focus Mode — it hides everything but the table!

focus_done.message: Use this when you want to focus!

real_complete.message: Tutorial complete — for real this time!

open_modal.message: Let's make a plan from scratch!
open_modal.description: Create mitigation plans for any dungeon or content.

category.message: Pick a type — let's try Dungeon

name.description: You can name it anything you like.

add_event.description: Click the + button to add an attack.

fill_event.message: We'll enter the attack name and damage
fill_event.description: Watch — we'll type it in for you.

miti.description: Sacred Soil and Divine Veil are already selected! Click Reprisal.

done.description: Add a thumbnail image or team logo, then share your plan with everyone.

completion.title: You've got the basics!
completion.menu_hint: You can revisit tutorials anytime from the tutorial menu.

completion_real.title: Okay, NOW you're done!
completion_real.menu_hint: You can revisit tutorials anytime from the tutorial menu.

new_plan.template_guidance: Want to start from a pre-filled template?
new_plan.plan_limit_total: You can have up to {{max}} mitigation plans. Please delete unused plans first.
new_plan.plan_limit_per_content: You can have up to {{max}} plans per content.
new_plan.plan_archive_warning: You have over {{threshold}} plans. Older plans outside of current Savage and Ultimate tiers will be automatically archived.
new_plan.guest_hint: Your data is saved in this browser only. <login>Sign in</login> to sync across devices and set a team logo on shared images.

mobile_guide.title: Getting Started
mobile_guide.step1_desc: Tap "Menu" at the bottom to pick a raid and create a mitigation plan
mobile_guide.step2_desc: Tap "Party" to assign jobs to each slot
mobile_guide.step3_desc: Tap a damage number to add mitigation skills for that attack
mobile_guide.step4_desc: Use "Tools" for Auto Plan and FFLogs Import
mobile_guide.step5_desc: Long press job icons and drag them to slots

nav.deleteAccountMessage: This action cannot be undone. All your mitigation plans and settings will be permanently deleted. Are you sure?

popular.title: Popular Plans
popular.subtitle: Most used mitigation plans
popular.no_data_desc: Share your plans to see them here

admin.hint_content_id: Short alphanumeric ID (e.g. m9s, ucob, tea). Cannot be changed later
admin.hint_category: Choose: Savage / Ultimate / Dungeon / Raid / Misc
admin.hint_short_name: Short name shown in sidebar and header
admin.hint_series: Groups related content in the same series
admin.hint_order: Sort order within series. 1=top. M9S=1, M10S=2, M11S=3...
admin.hint_fflogs_id: FFLogs encounter ID (used for FFLogs import). Leave empty if unknown
admin.templates_description: Templates = boss attack timeline data. This data is auto-loaded when users create a new plan.
admin.templates_upload_guide: Template JSON files use the same format as src/data/templates/. Usually auto-generated — manual upload is rarely needed.
admin.hint_template_file: Same format as .json files in src/data/templates/
admin.translations_save_confirm_jaen: {{count}} Japanese/English changes detected. This affects existing data. Continue?
admin.dash_what_to_do: What would you like to do?

admin.content_wiz_id_hint: Including the patch number helps avoid future duplicates (e.g. 7.2-m5s)
admin.content_wiz_series: Which series does it belong to?
admin.content_wiz_fflogs: Do you have an FFLogs ID?
admin.template_wiz_method: How would you like to create it?

admin.template_wiz_from_plan: Convert a plan to a template
admin.template_wiz_select_content: Which content is this template for?

admin.template_wiz_plan_note: Mitigation placements will be removed. Only boss actions will be kept.
admin.skill_wiz_mode: What would you like to do?
admin.skill_wiz_select_job: Which job is this skill for?
admin.skill_wiz_burst: Is there an initial extra mitigation?

admin.stats_wiz_mode: What would you like to do?

admin.backups_restore_confirm: Are you sure? Current data will be automatically backed up first.
admin.tpl_editor_empty: No template. Create one from the toolbar
admin.tpl_promote_replace_confirm: This will replace the current template. Continue?

backup.export_description: Download the file and keep it in a safe place. You can also copy the text and paste it into a notepad.
backup.restore_description: Paste the backup text into the area below, or select a downloaded file.
backup.restore_invalid_json: Invalid backup data. Please paste the correct backup text.
backup.restore_confirm_1_message: Your current plans will be overwritten with the backup data. This action cannot be undone.
backup.restore_confirm_2_message: {{backupCount}} plan(s) from the backup will be merged into your current {{currentCount}} plan(s).

boundary_modal.select_banner: Click to select end position (Esc to cancel)
